title: draba lasiocarpa subsp. klasterskyi
intro: Draba lasiocarpa subsp. klasterskyi, also known as Klastersky's draba, is a subspecies of the Draba lasiocarpa plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Draba lasiocarpa subsp. klasterskyi include the potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
